description_long: This is a modern, four-door red sedan with a sleek, aerodynamic body and a slightly aggressive front fascia. The car features a black mesh grille, angular headlights, and subtle hood sculpting, giving it a sporty yet refined appearance. The side profile reveals flush door handles, blacked-out window trim, and five-spoke black alloy wheels. The rear of the sedan is characterized by a smooth trunk, slim taillights, and a visible license plate area. The windows are tinted dark, and the roofline gently slopes toward the rear, enhancing its streamlined look. The overall design suggests a contemporary urban vehicle built for comfort and style.
description: A sleek, red four-door sedan with black alloy wheels, tinted windows, and a sporty, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black mesh grille, angular headlights, and sculpted hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the four doors, flush handles, black window trim, and five-spoke wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth trunk, slim taillights, and a visible license plate area.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same door and wheel features.
attribute_license_plate: Rear license plate present, rectangular, light-colored with dark text, text not fully readable
attribute_wheel_design: Five-spoke black alloy wheels with a simple, modern design
